description_long: This is a modern two-seater sofa with a sturdy, rectangular frame upholstered in a smooth, matte gray fabric. The seat and back cushions are upholstered in a vibrant red fabric, providing a striking contrast to the neutral frame. Four loose cushions—two square yellow and two rectangular orange—are arranged symmetrically, adding both comfort and visual interest. The armrests are straight, padded, and extend to the same height as the backrest, creating a boxy silhouette. The sofa stands on four short, cylindrical wooden legs with a light finish, slightly splayed for stability. The overall design is contemporary and inviting, suitable for urban parks, waiting areas, or outdoor lounges.
description: A modern gray sofa with red seat and back cushions, accented by yellow and orange throw pillows, and supported by four short wooden legs.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sofa's thick armrest, layered cushions, and the arrangement of pillows along the seat.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the full width of the sofa, the symmetrical placement of cushions, and the two-tone color scheme.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, highlighting the armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the plain gray upholstered back and the wooden legs, with no cushions or decorative elements visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large red seat cushions and two large red back cushions, both uniform in size and shape, with four loose throw pillows (two yellow square, two orange rectangular) symmetrically placed.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests at the same height as the backrest, rectangular profile, fully upholstered in gray fabric with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, cylindrical legs positioned at each corner, made of light-colored wood, slightly splayed outward, fully exposed and simple in design.
attribute_backrest_type: High, straight, continuous backrest with no visible segmentation or tufting, fully upholstered in gray fabric with attached red back cushions.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with a smooth, matte texture; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
